channel.title: about on Onur Copur
channel.description: Recent content in about on Onur Copur

item.title: About
item.description: I am an Industrial Engineer graduate and a Data Science Master’s student. Currently, my research interest is computer vision and natural language processing. I created this website to share my knowledge, document my course material and put some of my interesting codes. All the posts will be mainly about machine learning, statistics and python.
